creator: alex@cichlids.com
text:
updates port irc/ircII to version 4.4L.
Version 4.4L includes color support and other things

I could also take the maintainership of this port, if you like.
The Port has not been updated for a year now, and there were some version changes inbetween.

How-To-Repeat: 
apply the attache patch :)
